name: post-list

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with list, grid and carousel variants
changelog.1.1.0: Added fullwidth variant with pagination for fullscreen mode
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed id from Post interface. Use array index for key.
changelog.2.0.1: Added aria-labels to pagination and carousel navigation buttons for accessibility
changelog.2.0.2: Moved demo data to separate file for cleaner component code
changelog.2.0.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.2.0.5: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.2.0.6: Fixed circular dependency by moving Post interface to types.ts
changelog.2.0.7: Added bg-card background and margin to list variant for better dark/light mode support
changelog.3.0.0: BREAKING: Removed pagination (onPageChange, postsPerPage, control). Fullwidth variant now renders all posts.
changelog.3.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.3.0.2: Fixed missing tooltip dependency for shadcn CLI installation
changelog.3.0.3: Replaced key={index} with stable content-based keys
changelog.3.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided

title: Post List
author: MNFST, Inc
description: Post list with list, grid, carousel, and fullwidth variants. Fullwidth mode shows paginated posts.
